channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump requests changes to Iran deal his envoys negotiated
item.description: During a Situation Room meeting on Friday, President Trump asked for several amendments to the agreement his envoys reached with Iranian officials.

item.title: Schools embrace analog learning as screen use faces scrutiny
item.description: Parents, educators and lawmakers push to reduce classroom screen time over concerns about attention, behavior and learning.

item.title: What the 10 fastest-shrinking cities reveal about the US
item.description: Data from the U.S. Census Bureau shows population declines in certain cities, contrasting with booming exurban areas.

item.title: First Windows PCs with Nvidia chips expected next week
item.description: Nvidia, known for AI chips, is set to debut its first Windows computers, marking a push into the PC market.
